profile_target.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-trace --bench trace_baseline -- --sample-size 80 --measurement-time 3

optimization.lever: Replace trace-local monotonic TracerId -> ShapedArray and TracerId -> VarId ordered-map lookups with dense Vec-backed slots.

alien_graveyard_card.symptom: Hot trace construction path spends time in ordered-map lookups for monotonically allocated integer identifiers.
alien_graveyard_card.primitive: Cache-local dense layout / optimal memory layout for monotonic IDs.
alien_graveyard_card.fallback: Return TraceError through checked dense-slot helpers; if allocation monotonicity changes, restore ordered-map semantics or add an explicit sparse fallback.

proof_obligations: VarId assignment order remains invars, constvars, then equation outputs in original equation order.
Equation order, output order, params, and sub-jaxprs are not reordered.
Unbound tracer and unresolved output errors remain fail-closed TraceError results.
No floating-point operations or RNG are introduced or reordered.

baseline.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-trace --bench trace_baseline -- --sample-size 80 --measurement-time 3

after.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-trace --bench trace_baseline -- --sample-size 80 --measurement-time 3

keeper_benchmark.residual: trace/make_jaxpr_chain_5ops remained effectively unchanged in the keeper same-worker pair and needs a separate equation-clone/residual-graph pass.

behavior_proof.ordering: preserved: dense helpers assign VarId in the same explicit invar, constvar, equation-output traversal order; equations/outvars keep Vec order.
behavior_proof.tie_breaking: not applicable: trace construction has no tie-breaking policy.
behavior_proof.floating_point: not applicable to trace construction; no f64 arithmetic path changed.
behavior_proof.rng: not applicable: no RNG path touched.
behavior_proof.error_classes: preserved through checked dense-slot helpers returning TraceError::UnboundTracerInput, TraceError::UnresolvedOutvar, or TraceError::CompositionViolation instead of panicking.

validation.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- cargo check -p fj-trace --all-targets
RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-trace -- --nocapture
RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- cargo clippy -p fj-trace --all-targets -- -D warnings

validation.result: exit 0; 0 critical findings; remaining warnings are pre-existing fj-trace inventory

non_keeper_notes: A local fallback attempt outside /data/projects was ignored because RCH failed open locally.
An after-run on vmi1227854 before the final checked-helper tightening showed chain_5ops 2.0585 us, but the keeper pair uses the final code state on vmi1149989.
